channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Paris Diamond League to go ahead with safety measures amid heatwave
item.description: Only competitions involving professional athletes will be held, with all other activities cancelled.

item.title: US judge holds prosecutor in contempt in Charlie Kirk murder case
item.description: Judge says comments to the media by prosecutors about defendant violate rules of what can be said outside of court.

item.title: Venezuela shaken by magnitude 4.9 tremor days after major earthquakes
item.description: The country is still reeling from devastating pair of earthquakes that killed hundreds of people earlier this week.

item.title: Egypt vs Iran LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Live updates, score and commentary stream as Mohamed Salah's Egypt play Iran in the final group match in Seattle.

item.title: What is the framework agreement signed by Israel and Lebanon?
item.description: Deal comes after months of US-brokered direct talks, but Israel continues to occupy Lebanese land.

item.title: Desperate families search for missing loved ones in Venezuela
item.description: Families are sharing details about their loved ones online as more than 50,000 people remain missing in Venezuela.

item.title: Why did Africa boycott the 1966 World Cup?
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Samantha Johnson looks at why Africa boycotted the 1966 World Cup.

item.title: Heavyweight champion Usyk says vacating heavyweight world title belts
item.description: Usyk, who had held the WBA, WBC and IBF belts, has been the world undisputed cruiserweight and heavyweight champion.

item.title: Senegal score 5-0 win over 10-man Iraq, keep World Cup knockout hopes alive
item.description: Senegal currently hold the fifth-best record of third-place teams based on their plus-2 goal differential.

item.title: Dembele scores hat-trick as France beat Norway 4-1 at World Cup 2026
item.description: Dembele's ⁠first-half hat-trick helps France to a 4-1 win over second-string Norway ⁠to finish top of Group I.

item.title: Thousands of migrants flee South Africa ahead of anti-immigrant protests
item.description: Thousands of migrants flee South Africa ahead of anti-immigrant protests

item.title: Burkina Faso cuts diplomatic ties with former colonial ruler France
item.description: The military government, in power since 2022 coup, accused France of having 'neo-colonial ambitions'.

item.title: US strikes Iran in response to drone strike on commercial ship
item.description: The new strikes come in response to an Iranian drone attack on the Ever Lovely in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: UN rights chief calls for probe into migrant deaths in US detention centres
item.description: Deaths of immigrants held in US detention centres have surged during Donald Trump's second term.

item.title: Mistrial declared in federal arson case related to California wildfires
item.description: New trial set to take place in October after jury fails to reach decision in closely-watched case on Palisades Fire.

item.title: Hezbollah will not support Israel-Lebanon framework deal
item.description: Al Jazeera brings you the latest from Beirut as the US announces a framework agreement between Israel and Lebanon.

item.title: After progressive US primary wins, Trump takes aim at ‘godless communists’
item.description: Trump has repeatedly conflated democratic socialists and communists; no communist are running on the Democratic ticket.

item.title: Uruguay vs Spain LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: All the updates, with team news coverage and our text commentary stream, as Lamine Yamal's Spain face Uruguay.

item.title: US federal judge questions DOJ decision to drop Adani charges
item.description: Judge says DOJ's reasoning for dropping Adani charges lacks clarity; orders detailed explanation from prosecutors.

item.title: Israeli attack on car in central Gaza kills three Palestinians
item.description: Palestinian Interior Ministry says those killed in attack on Maghazi refugee camp were police officers.

item.title: How much disaster aid will the US provide to Venezuela?
item.description: Powerful back-to-back earthquakes leave behind destruction.

item.title: Trump threatens tariffs for countries that levy digital tax on US firms
item.description: The Republican leader has taken an aggressive stance against countries that weigh taxes or regulations on US tech firms.

item.title: Trump blames Iran for ‘foolish’ strike on cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US Central Command forces conduct strikes against Iran in 'response' to attack on commercial ship, Ever Lovely.

item.title: Is the AfD a threat to Germany? Mehdi Hasan & Maximilian Krah
item.description: Mehdi Hasan goes head-to-head with German MP Maximilian Krah on the AfD’s hardline immigration agenda

item.title: Israel, Lebanon sign framework deal after US-mediated talks
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio announced a US-mediated framework agreement between Israel and Lebanon.
